modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help inserting merge fields in Word document.

full_description_text: 
I was on a call with a user who was trying to insert merge fields in their Word document. They seemed a bit confused about the process and asked for guidance. It was clear they needed a straightforward explanation to get it done.
short_description: Need help inserting merge fields in Word document.
description: I was on a call with a user who was trying to insert merge fields in their Word document. They seemed a bit confused about the process and asked for guidance. It was clear they needed a straightforward explanation to get it done.
